Chane1 23c Early Spring Collection🌿
Enamel Black/White Check Mini Square Plump White
Counter price rmb Purchased for development~
23c Early Spring Checkered Mini Square Plump⚽️
I really love this mini❕Suitable for sporty style
Adjustable enamel metal ball not only exquisite craftsmanship
but also gives the bag many carrying methods〰️

Black is very versatile, suitable for all seasons, sweet or chic. Who wears it looks good〰️

items.name_en: In Stock In Stock 🆕21 Early Autumn Handle Chain Card Case Classic Quilted Square shape, slightly larger and thicker than a card case. Chain length is not detachable. Multiple leather handles for hand carrying. Vintage sand gold hardware. Retro literary style A. Size: 9.5*12.5*3.5cm

specs.rawTitle: In Stock In Stock 🆕21 Early Autumn Handle Chain Card Case Classic Quilted Square shape, slightly larger and thicker than a card case. Chain length is not detachable. Multiple leather handles for hand carrying. Vintage sand gold hardware. Retro literary style A. Size: 9.5*12.5*3.5cm

items.name_en: Chane1 Vintage AS6025. Vintage enthusiasts will recognize this bag. This double-C double-buckle briefcase is an original from the 1990s, full of vintage charm. The bag features a structured briefcase silhouette with smooth, bold lines. Paired with double-C double-buckles on fine leather, its charm may take time to appreciate but is worth savoring. It looks professional yet cute. It also features a chain that can be worn crossbody or shoulder, or unlocked for a new stylish look. It can also be carried by hand, making it lively, elegant, and unique. Very practical. Size: 23×16cm
items.name_cn: Chane1 Vintage AS6025. Vintage enthusiasts will recognize this bag. This double-C double-buckle briefcase is an original from the 1990s, full of vintage charm. The bag features a structured briefcase silhouette with smooth, bold lines. Paired with double-C double-buckles on fine leather, its charm may take time to appreciate but is worth savoring. It looks professional yet cute. It also features a chain that can be worn crossbody or shoulder, or unlocked for a new stylish look. It can also be carried by hand, making it lively, elegant, and unique. Very practical. Size: 23×16cm

items.name_en: 💦Chane1🧩24p hoho Shoulder Bag A. Collects all elements of 19bag, emitting a low-key luxury vibe~ It can easily handle any style of outfit. The large diamond quilt is more fashionable. Size: 13×20×4.5cm

items.name_en: Chanel 24P mini Denim Trash Bag
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24P mini Denim Trash Bag
Size: 20x19x6(cm)
22bag mini | It's denim season again. The new 24bag denim mini has really won me over! White topstitching and blue denim are a fashion statement SOS. Matching color chain and silver hardware are casual yet refined~
The bag capacity is completely sufficient! Super surprising~
Seeing this mini, I can't wait for summer~
Style No. AS3980

specs.rawTitle:
Chanel 24P mini Denim Trash Bag
Size: 20x19x6(cm)
22bag mini | It's denim season again. The new 24bag denim mini has really won me over! White topstitching and blue denim are a fashion statement SOS. Matching color chain and silver hardware are casual yet refined~
The bag capacity is completely sufficient! Super surprising~

items.name_en: Chanel 24P Denim Trash Bag
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24P Denim Trash Bag
Size: 35x37x7(cm)
The 24P Spring/Summer series has released a new denim style. Compared to the 22 old model, the main difference is the gradient visual effect on the body and the grand diamond quilt. The new diamond quilt is full of ingenuity! Created with white and dark blue stitching, it forms a three-dimensional effect from light to dark that matches the blue body perfectly. It still uses matching leather-wrapped chain, and all hardware is silver, which looks great with the blue! A touch of coolness amidst the fashion~
Style No. AS3260

specs.rawTitle:
Chanel 24P Denim Trash Bag
Size: 35x37x7(cm)
The 24P Spring/Summer series has released a new denim style. Compared to the 22 old model, the main difference is the gradient visual effect on the body and the grand diamond quilt. The new diamond quilt is full of ingenuity! Created with white and dark blue stitching, it forms a three-dimensional effect from light to dark that matches the blue body perfectly. Style No. AS3260
